title: papaver minus
intro: Papaver minus, also known as the less or little poppy, is a plant species that belongs to the poppy family (Papaveraceae). The plant contains various medicinal compounds, including alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Papaver minus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable remedy for skin issues, anxiety, and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Papaver minus are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are used to treat a range of ailments, from digestive issues to respiratory problems.
